name: RNC Mortgage B Lenders For Construction & Land
description_short: RNC Lending Agency provides construction, bridge, land, and mortgage loans up to $75M for owners, investors, and developers nationwide with fast closing and competitive rates.
description_long:
RNC Lending Agency (operating under parent company Realm Nexus Corporation) is a nationwide lender specializing in construction and bridge financing. The company positions itself as a streamlined alternative to traditional mortgage lenders, emphasizing speed and accessibility for borrowers who need capital for property improvements, acquisitions, or development projects.

The company offers construction loans, bridge loans, land loans, and traditional mortgages with loan amounts up to $75 million and terms up to 3 years with extension options. Their underwriting accepts properties with no minimum occupancy requirements, accommodates residential properties (houses through 5+ unit multifamily) and commercial properties (multi-family, mixed-use, office, warehouse, retail, industrial, hospitality, and pre-development). Maximum loan-to-value ratios reach 70% and loan-to-cost up to 65%, depending on property type. Rates are described as "market competitive floating rate – dependent upon risk."

RNC differentiates itself through advertised speed of closing, availability of private hard money loans, accurate appraisals conducted in-house, and a team of described "local mortgage experts." Their nationwide reach and willingness to lend on construction and development properties positions them outside traditional bank lending. The company emphasizes their extensive experience and streamlined processing as core competitive advantages.

While the website demonstrates established lending infrastructure, specific interest rates, approval timelines, and actual closing speeds are not disclosed. The phrase "market competitive" rates provides no pricing transparency. No information is provided regarding prepayment penalties, origination fees, or other loan costs. Borrowers should verify whether the company maintains state mortgage licensing and whether their "hard money" products comply with consumer lending regulations in their jurisdiction.
address: 80 E Rich St Suite 200, Columbus, OH 43215

company_info.headquarters: 80 E Rich St Suite 200, Columbus, OH 43215

pros: Loan amounts up to $75 million, addressing large development and investor needs
Nationwide lender with no geographic restrictions mentioned
Accepts construction and development properties traditional banks decline
No minimum occupancy requirements, enabling purchase of vacant or pre-occupancy properties
Up to 3-year terms with extension options, providing flexibility for development timelines
Private hard money loan options available for difficult-to-finance properties
Advertises accurate in-house appraisals and local mortgage expertise
cons: No specific interest rates or APRs disclosed; only vague "market competitive floating rate" reference
Loan-to-value and loan-to-cost caps (70% and 65%) are lower than conventional mortgages, requiring larger down payments
No information provided about origination fees, closing costs, prepayment penalties, or other loan charges
Actual closing timelines not specified despite "fast closing" claim; no data on approval speed
Limited transparency on borrower qualification criteria, credit score requirements, or debt-to-income thresholds
best_for: Real estate developers and construction companies needing large loans ($5M-$75M) for new projects
Real estate investors requiring bridge financing between property purchase and sale or refinance
Land buyers and owners seeking financing for vacant or raw land acquisition and improvement
Borrowers with non-traditional properties (pre-development, mixed-use, hospitality) that conventional lenders reject
diagnosis: RNC Lending Agency is best suited for experienced real estate investors, developers, and commercial borrowers seeking construction or bridge financing in the $5M-$75M range who can meet higher down payment requirements (30%+ equity) and tolerate floating interest rates. The primary caveat is complete absence of transparent pricing, actual lending terms, and approval timelines—prospective borrowers must call (888) 205-3497 to obtain any concrete loan details before considering application.
services: Construction loans for new build projects
Bridge loans for gap financing between purchase and permanent financing
Land loans for raw or undeveloped property acquisition
Hard money loans for difficult-to-finance properties
Loan terms up to 3 years with extension options
meta_description: RNC Lending Agency provides construction, bridge, land, and mortgage loans up to $75M with fast closing and competitive rates.
